title: What do you want expect in the last manga volume
display_title: What do you want expect in the last manga volume
wikitext:
[]: What do you want/expect in the last manga volume?             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sat Nov 08, 2014 2:17 am As we know, the final volume of the manga is being released on November 20th, and it will include 28 unpublished pages containing a "new character". We already have a thread about the volume in general, but i wanted to know, what are YOUR personal hopes and expectations for this new material?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Nov 08, 2014 2:37 am I want to know what the hell is up with Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Sat Nov 08, 2014 6:12 am wait sorry i have not really been following the mangas i thought there was shinseiki evangelion and then a bunch of spinoffs?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 08, 2014 8:55 am ^ Sadamoto (the main mecha designer of NGE) made a manga adapting NGE serving as an introduction to the series (in fact, the first chapters were released before the first episode airing!), with several liberties taken both in characters and events: Shinji is less passive and more of a smartass, Asuka is slightly less psychotic (and the product of in vitro fecundation), Gendo is a full blown asshole with a god complex toward the end, and Kaworu is... let's say much less sympathetic than in the series and film, some Angels don't appear, the outcome of Bardiel is slightly different... It's also (in)famous for the lot of Rei/Shinji teasing, its departure from EoE and especially the ending that has as little to do with the series as between NGE and Q.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Sat Nov 08, 2014 8:57 am ^ but didnt that one finish? that was the shinseiki evangelion and i remember it ending with a world reboot and Shinji going to college i think it was?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 08, 2014 9:17 am It finished over a year ago; but the final tankoubon is only published in two weeks time (in Japan, and many other countries - but the US translation looks as if it's being delayed, sound familiar?). There will also be an extra 28-page chapter with a new character - but how this relates to the rest of the manga is unknown.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sat Nov 08, 2014 3:43 pm I hope we see the survivors living a happy college life, a comic episode. And, IMO, the manga pros are just the art (great) and some info that doesn't goes against anime canon. But the the screenplay is just BS and it gets worse as far as it advances. What Sadamoto did to Asuka and Gendo was just awful, they are a fucking joke . The redhead gets the worst part because YS keeps showing her as a spoiled brat and her relationship with Shinji has nothing to do which they had in NGE. And Gendo....well, he deserves dead and loneliness more than his counterpart in NGE.......but he fulfills his fucking wish!!!! And Shinji....ahhh, our dear asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sat Nov 08, 2014 11:51 pm I'm not sure I want an epilogue. The story ended on a good enough note as it was. I'd be fine with a side story focusing on some of the supporting characters or a prequel (how the Eva Units were created and tested, for example), though.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Nov 09, 2014 4:08 am El Squibbonator wrote: I'm not sure I want an epilogue. The story ended on a good enough note as it was. I'd be fine with a side story focusing on some of the supporting characters or a prequel (how the Eva Units were created and tested, for example), though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Nov 09, 2014 8:59 am Jäeger wrote: I hope we see the survivors living a happy college life, a comic episode. And, IMO, the manga pros are just the art (great) and some info that doesn't goes against anime canon. But the the screenplay is just BS and it gets worse as far as it advances. What Sadamoto did to Asuka and Gendo was just awful, they are a fucking joke . The redhead gets the worst part because YS keeps showing her as a spoiled brat and her relationship with Shinji has nothing to do which they had in NGE. And Gendo....well, he deserves dead and loneliness more than his counterpart in NGE.......but he fulfills his fucking wish!!!! And Shinji....ahhh, our dear asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sun Nov 09, 2014 11:37 am Perhaps I should have been more specific. What I do not hope to see is "Shinji and Asuka as a happy suburban couple with 2.5 kids and a dog."

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 09, 2014 11:51 am Sure; that would make it RahXephon ! Anyone who thinks they should complain about Sadamoto's manga needs to look at the ones made from RahXephon and Magical Shopping Arcade Abenobashi to see how bad knock-off mangas really can be.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 09, 2014 11:52 am Nah, Asuka will be the crazy cat lady before she finishes college, but one of the cats happens to be Mari

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sun Nov 09, 2014 11:59 am pwhodges wrote: Sure; that would make it RahXephon .

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:06 pm El Squibbonator wrote: I don't know what that is. But, from what I gather, are you saying that whatever happens in the manga, it won't affect the anime or Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:06 pm El Squibbonator wrote: Perhaps I should have been more specific. What I do not hope to see is "Shinji and Asuka as a happy suburban couple with 2.5 kids and a dog."

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:15 pm So then Sadamato would be ripping off the ripoff?

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:31 pm But i liked Magical Shopping Arcade Abenobashi.......

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:42 pm The manga? Really? Ah well - different tastes etc . El Squibbonator wrote: So then Sadamato would be ripping off the ripoff?

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Sun Nov 09, 2014 12:43 pm pwhodges wrote: The manga? Really? Ah well - different tastes etc .

We already have a thread about the volume in general, but i wanted to know, what are YOUR personal hopes and expectations for this new material?
